message:
🐛 Use PAT for auto-qa issue creation to trigger downstream workflows (#230)

GitHub's security model prevents GITHUB_TOKEN-generated events from
triggering other workflows. This caused auto-qa created issues to not
trigger implement-fix.lock.yml, so Copilot was never auto-assigned.

Switch to CONSOLE_AUTO PAT for both label creation and issue creation
in the github-script step so that `issues: labeled` events properly
propagate and trigger the implement-fix workflow.

Fixes: issues #225, #226 not auto-assigning to Copilot

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
